name: The Clubhouse on 6
about: The Clubhouse on 6 is an indoor golf simulator facility in Mahopac, NY, offering state-of-the-art virtual golf technology. The venue provides a realistic golf experience any time, in any weather, with five simulators available for play. It caters to individual players, groups, and those looking for lessons, with a pricing model based on hourly simulator reservations. The facility emphasizes technology, convenience, and a welcoming environment for golfers of all skill levels to enjoy a round, practice, or take a lesson.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulator technology available
Flexible hourly pricing without per-person fees
Lessons available for all skill levels with professional instructors
Craft beer wall and food options available on-site

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available for food purchases
Craft beer wall and alcoholic beverages available for purchase

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players are encouraged to bring their own clubs for the best simulator experience. Clean clubs are required, and club rentals are available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are allowed to be brought into the facility. On-site food and a craft beer wall are available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: It takes approximately one hour for an individual player to play 18 holes. Groups should book an additional hour for each player.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Children under 16 can use the simulators but must be accompanied by an adult at all times.
